caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden lectern, delivering a speech in an indoor setting. He is dressed in a light-colored traditional Indian outfit, consisting of a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a light beige sleeveless jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the lectern in front of him. The background features a textured, dark green wall with a geometric pattern of interlocking rectangular blocks, accented by gold-colored cylindrical pillars with small red floral arrangements. Across the sequence, Modi remains in a stationary position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and facial expressions as he addresses an audience. The lighting is consistent, and there is no on-screen text or logos visible. The scene remains stable, with the only movement being Modi's subtle shifts in posture and expression as he continues his address.
